criteria.description: Task 2 and Task 3 now align with the lite skill semantics, and the share summary derives facts from the lite proof set instead of the old full-version stages.
criteria.notes: Task 2 now renders credential/profile/resonance/points stages, Task 3 renders points/factions/joined/leaderboard stages, and unit coverage verifies the lite repo plus supporting facts.

criteria.description: The Hero primary CTA is open again, the Agent handoff section is restored, and the CTA scrolls into the lite handoff target instead of staying disabled.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage now checks section order, CTA enabled state, and the `#agent-prompt` scroll target.

criteria.description: The landing page no longer shows the old full-version wording, and the full test plus build verification passes on the target branch.
criteria.evidence: tests/integration/longpage.spec.tsx + npm run test + npm run build
criteria.notes: Visible page assertions now reject `开放寻配 / 宣誓 / 授权 / Telegram 报到`, and the repo passes the final regression/build run.
